AutoCAD MEP add-in · AutoCAD MEP 2024+ · Windows

AutoCAD Copilot

An AI engineer that lives inside AutoCAD MEP — same agent, same tools, same project memory.

The Adelphos Copilot for AutoCAD MEP teams. Talk to your drawing the same way you talk to Revit. Every Adelphos tool, callable from a chat panel inside AutoCAD.

Download AutoCAD add-in → See the Revit Copilot

Why use AutoCAD Copilot

AutoCAD Copilot is the AutoCAD-side counterpart to the Revit Copilot. Same agent, same project memory, same MCP tool surface — except it lives in AutoCAD MEP. Practices that run a mixed Revit + AutoCAD environment use both Copilots side by side.

Adelphos will be the only building services software provider that addresses the entire process, start to finish — designed and built by industry professionals who have experienced the gap in the market.

How it works

What makes it different

Features

What AutoCAD Copilot does. Each line is a shipped capability.

AutoCAD Copilot features

Chat-in-AutoCAD Docked panel inside AutoCAD MEP. Same agent as Revit.
MCP tool surface Every Adelphos tool callable from inside the drawing.
Cross-tool memory Picks up where the Revit Copilot left off on the same project.

Install & system

Where AutoCAD Copilot runs, what you need, and how to get it.

Who it's for

AutoCAD MEP teamsMixed Revit + AutoCAD practicesExisting-building schemes drawn in CAD

Related

App Revit Copilot Talk to Revit. The Copilot understands your model, applies your standards, and runs every command and tool on the platform — and it's open, so you can add your own. App Adelphos Chat Same agent. Same project context. Browser, phone, or desktop. The Adelphos Chat is the agent untethered from any one tool. Agentic service AI Finances Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data.

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is AutoCAD Copilot?

The Adelphos Copilot for AutoCAD MEP teams. Talk to your drawing the same way you talk to Revit. Every Adelphos tool, callable from a chat panel inside AutoCAD.

What platform does AutoCAD Copilot run on?

AutoCAD MEP add-in · AutoCAD MEP 2024+ · Windows

Who is AutoCAD Copilot for?

AutoCAD MEP teams; Mixed Revit + AutoCAD practices; Existing-building schemes drawn in CAD.

How do I get AutoCAD Copilot?

Self-serve: Download AutoCAD add-in at /dist/downloads/index.html. No sales call required.
